system:
You are asked questions about a synthetic world. You are given NO background material — only the question itself. If you cannot know the answer, give your best guess in the required format anyway.
Answer format: for true/false questions reply with exactly one word, true or false. For list questions reply with a JSON array of entity IDs, e.g. ["customer_03","customer_07"], or [] if none.
user:
Question: On day 360, across frames [actual], list every partner value X such that registered_in(partner=?X, partner2=partner_10, partner3=partner_04) holds, labeling each value with the frame it holds in. Answer as (value, frame) pairs (possibly empty).
Structured form: {"at_day":360,"find_slot":"partner","pattern":{"relation":"rel_b00_registered_in","args":{"partner":{"var":"X"},"partner2":{"const":"partner_10"},"partner3":{"const":"partner_04"}}}}
